title: Star Pilot
writer: Ian Danby, Pietro Francisci, Fernando Paolo Girolami
actors: Leonora Ruffo, Mario Novelli, Roland Lesaffre
plot: A spaceship from Hydra crashes on Sardinia. Aliens take a scientist, his daughter, technicians and spies hostage to fix their ship. After repairs, aliens abduct the humans but they rebel, sending the ship into deep space.
